qtype: set notation and operations (union, intersection, number of elements)
tex:
$C = \{x : x \text{ is an integer and } 5 < x < 12\}$ \qquad $D = \{5, 10\}$

(a) Put a ring around the correct statement from the list below.
\newline

    $D = \varnothing$ \qquad $C \cap D = \{10\}$ \qquad $6 \in D$ \qquad $D \subset C$

(b) Find $\text{n}(C \cup D)$.
\newline

stem.content: $C = \{x : x \text{ is an integer and } 5 < x < 12\}$ \qquad $D = \{5, 10\}$

tex:

\newline
